title: ZXBrick Overview
description: Discover ZXBrick, the retro-inspired brick-breaking arcade game featuring 100 handcrafted levels, power-ups, achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins.
summary: ZXBrick combines classic brick-breaking gameplay with modern progression, rewarding skill, precision, and replayability.

images.caption: Get ready to begin your next game.
Start a new game or continue your progress.
Every level offers a fresh challenge.
Destroy every brick and chase a new high score.

sections.heading: Welcome to ZXBrick
paragraphs: ZXBrick is a retro-inspired brick-breaking arcade game and part of the ZX Series from BarkinMad Studios.
Complete 100 handcrafted levels, collect power-ups, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for the highest score as you master increasingly challenging brick layouts.

sections.heading: Getting Started
paragraphs: If you're new to ZXBrick, begin with the How to Play guide before exploring the Controls, Levels, Power-Ups, and Tips & Strategy pages.
Each guide focuses on a different part of the game, helping you build your skills one step at a time.

sections.heading: Part of the ZX Series
paragraphs: ZXBrick is part of the growing ZX Series, sharing BarkinMad Coins, achievements, and progression with other supported games.
If you enjoy ZXBrick, you can continue your arcade adventure with games such as ZXSnake, ZXSpace, and ZXPong.

featureShowcases.heading: Everything You Need to Get Started
featureShowcases.summary: Discover what makes ZXBrick fun and where to learn more about every part of the game.
body: ZXBrick combines classic arcade gameplay with modern progression, creating a rewarding experience that's easy to learn but challenging to master.
This guide introduces the game, explains the core mechanics, and points you towards the guides that will help you improve your skills.
bullets: Explore achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins.

image.caption: Everything begins with your first game.

featureShowcases.heading: Keep Improving
featureShowcases.summary: Every game helps you unlock achievements, climb the leaderboards, and earn BarkinMad Coins.
body: As your skills improve, you'll unlock achievements, compete for higher leaderboard positions, and collect BarkinMad Coins that can be used across supported ZX Series games.
Whether you're chasing your next personal best or working towards 100% completion, every game brings you closer to your next goal.
bullets: Continue improving every time you play.

image.caption: Every game is another opportunity to improve.
